name: Juventus VR
short_description: Juventus VR: experience the Juventus universe in virtual reality.
detailed_description: Juventus VR is the new official Juventus app that brings you closer to the action than ever before in virtual reality. Experience Juventus from the view point of your favourite heroes: soak in the Stadium atmosphere from the centre circle, step inside the home dressing room, go behind the scenes at Juventus Center, take a journey through Bianconeri history at J|Museum. Juventus VR brings the Juventus universe to you, from the comfort of your own home.
about_the_game: Juventus VR is the new official Juventus app that brings you closer to the action than ever before in virtual reality. Experience Juventus from the view point of your favourite heroes: soak in the Stadium atmosphere from the centre circle, step inside the home dressing room, go behind the scenes at Juventus Center, take a journey through Bianconeri history at J|Museum. Juventus VR brings the Juventus universe to you, from the comfort of your own home.
supported_languages: English, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese
